description: Resemble AI Detect: deepfake detection for audio, video, and image content. Blocks LLM requests whose media inputs are flagged as synthetic or manipulated. Includes optional audio source tracing, reverse image search, and Zero Retention Mode.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your Resemble AI API token. Get one from https://app.resemble.ai/account/api

apiBase.label: API Base URL
apiBase.description: Override the Resemble API base URL (default: https://app.resemble.ai/api/v2)

description.text: Scan audio, video, or image URLs referenced in the request for deepfake / synthetic content. The guardrail fails when Resemble labels the media as fake or when the aggregated score exceeds the configured threshold.
Aggregated score above which media is treated as fake (0.0–1.0). Default 0.5.
Optionally force audio / video / image. If omitted, Resemble auto-detects from the file extension or content type.
Identify which TTS vendor (elevenlabs, resemble_ai, etc.) generated the audio when it is flagged as fake.
For image detections, search the web for matching images to improve accuracy.
Automatically delete submitted media after detection completes. URLs are redacted and filenames are tokenized.

Where to find the media URL. 'auto' inspects multimodal content parts, then regex-extracts from text, then metadata. 'metadata' reads context.metadata[metadataKey]. 'content' only inspects message content.
When urlSource is 'metadata' or 'auto', read the URL from context.metadata[metadataKey]. Default 'mediaUrl'.
How often to poll Resemble for the detection result. Default 2000ms.
Maximum total time to wait for the detection result before failing open. Default 60000ms (60s).
If true, Resemble API errors (network, auth, timeout) will BLOCK the request. If false (default), errors are logged but the request passes through.
